headline: The Trade Desk Appoints Vinny Rinaldi as Vice President of Client Strategy & Growth
summary: VENTURA, Calif., July 16, 2026--The Trade Desk, a leading advertising technology company, today announced that Vinny Rinaldi has joined the company as Vice President of Client Strategy & Growth. In this role, Rinaldi will partner closely with marketers to help them unlock greater value from data-driven advertising, navigate the rapidly evolving media landscape and accelerate business growth through the premium open internet. Rinaldi will report to Chief Operating Officer, Vivek Kundra.

headline: Retail sales up just 0.2% in June, but excluding business at the gas pump, shoppers are resilient
summary: Shoppers slowed their spending in June from May, but excluding business at the gas pump, shoppers showed resilience despite ongoing economic uncertainty as they bought cars and took advantage of summer sales events.  Retail sales rose 0.2% in June, after being up a revised 1% in May, according to the Commerce Department's report released on Thursday.  Outside of gas stations, retail sales rose a robust 0.7%, according to the report.

Outside of gas stations, retail sales rose a robust 0.7%, according to the report.
